title: Model, Surface, Capability, and Constraint Selection · Failure Case: Surface Fit
summary: Choose between Claude and Codex surfaces for a repository and document task. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt surface fit increment in a capability and surface decision matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose chat, coding-agent, API, or workflow surfaces according to state, tools, latency, and review needs.
Combine deterministic checks, rubric review, and human inspection without treating one judge as truth.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.prompt:
# Cross-agent prompt portfolio
# Add tested contracts below. Keep shared intent separate from Claude and Codex adaptations.

steps.title: Predict Surface Fit
steps.instruction:
Use a changed theory case derived from this module: prompt model surface. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Use a changed theory case derived from this module: prompt model surface. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. Before reading, predict which action preserves the Surface Fit contract.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for choose chat, coding-agent, api, or workflow surfaces according to state, tools, latency, and review needs.

content.text: Choose chat, coding-agent, API, or workflow surfaces according to state, tools, latency, and review needs. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

steps.title: Build Surface Fit evidence
steps.instruction: Append a contract headed "Evidence: prompt-surface-fit-w6ecft" with concrete Goal, Context, Constraints, Output, and Done when sections tailored to this case.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Surface Fit into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
Evidence: prompt-surface-fit-w6ecft
Goal: [replace with one observable outcome]
Context: [replace with decision-relevant facts]
Constraints: [replace with authority and safety boundaries]
Output: [replace with the artifact and evidence shape]
Done when: [replace with changed-case acceptance criteria]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

steps.title: Defend the Surface Fit model
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Surface Fit applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Choose chat, coding-agent, API, or workflow surfaces according to state, tools, latency, and review needs.
